SQL> set feedback off SQL> set heading on SQL> set linesize 1500 SQL> set termout on SQL> set trim on SQL> set trimspool on SQL> set veri off SQL> col instart_fmt noprint SQL> col inst_name format a12 heading 'Instance' SQL> col db_name format a12 heading 'DB Name' SQL> col snap_id format 99999990 heading 'Snap Id' SQL> col snapdat format a18 heading 'Snap Started' just c SQL> col lvl format 99 heading 'Snap|Level' SQL> SQL> break on inst_name on db_name on host on instart_fmt skip 1 SQL> SQL> ttitle off SQL> SQL> SQL> SQL> SELECT * from TABLE(DBMS_WORKLOAD_REPOSITORY.awr_diff_report_html(5816664,1,120161,120169,1516462261,1,120265,120273)); PGA Aggr Target Stats

  • B1: 1st Begin Snap E1: 1st End Snap B2: 2nd Begin Snap E2: 2nd End Snap
  • Data shown in the table represent actual values, i.e. not diffed over the interval
  • Auto PGA Target - actual workarea memory target
  • W/A PGA Used - amount of memory used for all Workareas (manual + auto)
  • %PGA W/A Mem - percentage of PGA memory allocated to workareas
  • %Auto W/A Mem - percentage of workarea memory controlled by Auto Mem Mgmt
  • %Man W/A Mem - percentage of workarea memory under manual control
OUTPUT ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Undo Segment Summary

  • Min/Max TR (mins) - Min and Max Tuned Retention (minutes)
  • STO - Snapshot Too Old count, OOS - Out of Space count
  • Undo segment block stats:
  • uS - unexpired Stolen, uR - unexpired Released, uU - unexpired reUsed
  • eS - expired Stolen, eR - expired Released, eU - expired reUsed

OUTPUT ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Rule Set by Evaluations

  • Data accumulates from the most recent instance startup for each interval
  • Rule prefixed by * indicates Rule Set activity (re)started between Begin/End snapshots
  • SQL per Eval - average number of SQL statements executed for non-SQL free evals
  • CPU(s), Ela(s) per Eval - avg CPU and Elapsed time per evaluation includes both SQL free and non-SQL free evals
  • Ordered by absolute value of '%Diff' column of 'Evals', descending
OUTPUT ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 Evals No-SQL Eval%SQL Execs CPU(s) Ela(s) Eval/Sec SQL per Eval Ela(s) per Eval CPU(s) per Eval Reloads
Ruleset Name1st2nd%Diff1st2nd1st2nd%Diff1st2nd%Diff1st2nd%Diff1st2nd%Diff1st2nd%Diff1st2nd%Diff1st2nd%Diff1st2nd%Diff
SYS.ALERT_QUE_R305-83.330.000.00000.0000.000.0000.000.000.000.000.000.000.000.000.000.000.000.000.000.00000.00

Back to Advanced Queuing
Back to Top

Rule Set by Elapsed Time

  • Data accumulates from the most recent instance startup for each interval
  • Rule prefixed by * indicates Rule Set activity (re)started between Begin/End snapshots
    • OUTPUT ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  • SQL per Eval - average number of SQL statements executed for non-SQL free evals
  • CPU(s), Ela(s) per Eval - avg CPU and Elapsed time per evaluation includes both SQL free and non-SQL free evals
  • Ordered by absolute value of '%Diff' column of 'Ela(s)', descending
OUTPUT ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 Ela(s) No-SQL Eval% SQL Execs CPU(s) Evals Eval/SecSQL per Eval Ela(s) per Eval CPU(s) per Eval Reloads
Ruleset Name1st2nd%Diff1st2nd1st2nd%Diff1st2nd%Diff1st2nd%Diff1st2nd%Diff1st2nd%Diff1st2nd%Diff1st2nd%Diff1st2nd%Diff
SYS.ALERT_QUE_R00.000.000.000.00000.0000.000.00305-83.330.000.000.000.000.000.000.000.000.000.000.000.00000.00

OUTPUT ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Back to Advanced Queuing
Back to Top

Persistent Queues

  • Data accumulates from the most recent instance startup for each interval
  • Queue Name prefixed by * indicates queue activity (re)started between Begin/End snapshots
  • %Exp Msgs - % of msgs enqueued with expiry
  • %Delay Msgs - % of msgs enqueued with delay
  • %Trasf Time - % of Enqueue time spent in transformation
  • %Eval Time - % of Enqueue time spent in rule evaluation
    • OUTPUT ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  • Ordered by absolute value of '%Diff' column of 'Enq Msgs', descending
OUTPUT ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ OUTPUT ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

OUTPUT ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

init.ora Parameters

  • Only explicitly set parameters are included
  • Parameters values for the Begin Snapshot are shown only if they differ from those for the End snapshot
  • Parameters values for the second period are shown only if they differ from those for the first period
  • Value '(DEFAULT)' indicates that parameter was not set for the period

_backup_file_bufcnt 4

_disable_directory_link_check   TRUE

_optimizer_use_feedback FALSE  
_rowsets_enabled   FALSE
_securefiles_concurrency_estimate 50

OUTPUT ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

init.ora Multi-Valued Parameters

  • This section only displays parameters that have more one value
  • Only explicitly set parameters are included
  • Parameters values for the Begin Snapshot are shown only if they differ from those for the End snapshot
  • Parameters values for the second period are shown only if they differ from those for the first period
  • Value '(DEFAULT)' indicates that parameter was not set for the period
  • Value '(NULL)' in the Begin/End snapshot indicates that the parameter value was not set for that period

0az7czjdw8z7j declare lbRec dbms_rcvman.lbRec_t; lbCursor dbms_rcvman.lbCursor_t; first boolean := FALSE; ret boolean; begin if (:first > 0) then OUTPUT ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ first := TRUE; end if; <<next_row>> ret := dbms_rcvman.listBackup( lbRecOut => lbRec, firstCall => first, only_obsolete => TRUE, redundancy => :redundancy, piped_call => FALSE, lbCursor => lbCursor, lbState => dbms_rcvman.lbStatePck, OUTPUT ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ extRlKeepSCN => NULL); if (not ret) then raise no_data_foun d; elsif (lbRec.pkey is not null and lbRec.is_rdf = 'YES') then :backup_type := lbRec.backup_type; :file_type := lbRec.file_type; :key := lbRec.pkey; else first := FALSE; OUTPUT ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ goto next_row; end if; end;
